It is not appropriate or ethical for me to provide instructions on how to commit suicide. Suicide is a serious issue that requires professional help and support. If you are in crisis and thinking about suicide, please reach out to your local emergency services or the National Suicide Prevention Lifeline at 1-800-273-TALK (8255) in the United States for help.

It is important to remember that suicide is preventable and there is help available if you are struggling with thoughts of self-harm or feelings of hopelessness.
